changes.text: Implemented server-side (Convex) authorization for admin endpoints - password verification now happens on the server rather than client-side.
Removed client-side secret checks and sessionStorage reliance for admin access control.
Admin data hooks (listAll, getStats) now conditionally initialize only after successful server-side authentication.
Integrated YouTube Audio Bridge: Sync lyrics directly using any YouTube URL without downloading files.
Floating Video Preview: Toggleable YouTube video window for frame-accurate visual synchronization.
Universal URL Support: Added the ability to load and play audio from direct web links (MP3, WAV, M4A).
Flat Reference Waveform: Reliable straight-line waveform for streaming audio sources where peaks are unavailable.
Unified 'Change Source' Workflow: Seamlessly switch between local files and URLs within the same project.
Ultra-fast Proof-of-Work (PoW) solver using multi-threaded Web Workers (up to 10x faster cracking).
Refined LRCLIB Publish system with real-time status tracking and non-blocking background processing.
Resolved UI component conflicts and TypeScript errors in the Search & Import dialogs.
Universal Mobile Optimization: Optimized layouts, font-scaling, and touch interactions across all major dialogs and editors.
Introduced Video Export (MP4) with high-quality Canvas recording and multiple resolutions.
Added Enhanced Metadata Editor for ID3 tags, cover art, and lyric embedding.
Rebranded platform to Yosync Studio with updated UI and visual elements.
Implemented Smart Mixed-Mode sync rendering for video (Switching between word and line sync).
Encrypted Local Storage for sensitive project data.

features: ID3 Metadata Tagging & Cover Art Management
